headline: Gain a competitive edge on the racetrack with the Garmin Catalyst R1 radar
summary: Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the unrivaled Garmin Catalyst™ R1 racing radar, purpose-built to provide high-performance drivers with more situational awareness1 in their vehicle for a competitive advantage on the racetrack. The radar system features heads-up indicator lights that are positioned within the driver's line of sight in the cockpit, allowing them to keep their eyes on the track and maintain awareness of vehicles approaching from behind.

content.title: Gain a competitive edge on the racetrack with the Garmin Catalyst R1 radar
content.summary: Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the unrivaled Garmin Catalyst™ R1 racing radar, purpose-built to provide high-performance drivers with more situational awareness1 in their vehicle for a competitive advantage on the racetrack. The radar system features heads-up indicator lights that are positioned within the driver's line of sight in the cockpit, allowing them to keep their eyes on the track and maintain awareness of vehicles approaching from behind.

thumbnail.caption: Innovative auto racing radar system provides visual alerts for approaching vehicles to improve awareness and support defense performance.
